summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SyncTech FlowOps new features including LLM-powered agent reasoning, cascade recovery visualization, and SyncTech branding. All 3 new features working perfectly with real GPT-4o-mini integration.

Frontend: Agent status badges show correct colors (green=active, yellow=idle, red=stuck)
LLM integration working with real Emergent LLM key (GPT-4o-mini) - no mocked responses
